blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,861 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
